Id1.text: The Chinese Filipino is an ethnic group in the Philippines, where batchoy is a traditional dish.

Id2.text: Chinese Filipino are from the Philippines, where batchoy is eaten.

Id3.text: Batchoy is a food from the Philippines, the country where there is an ethnic group called the Chinese Filipino.
